name: facebook-event-scraper
strengths: Focused single-source extraction for event pages and hosted event lists
weaknesses: Facebook only and no broader quality or truth layer
learning_for_eventbaer: Single-source connectors can be valuable as modular adapters but should never be the system core.
possible_implication: Build per-platform connectors as optional source families behind EventBär audit and quality gates.

name: city-scrapers
strengths: Toolkit and scraper family for extracting civic data from many source systems. | Topics: scraper, events, open-data, python | Languages: Python | Likely decision-relevant for EventBaer soon
weaknesses: Needs deeper repo reading to confirm system depth
learning_for_eventbaer: Source infrastructure should be built as reusable families instead of isolated one-off connectors.
possible_implication: Review and adapt the pattern into the EventBaer worker architecture, not as direct dependency.

name: openevents
strengths: Open source events platform with structured event and venue concepts. | Topics: events, calendar, venue, open-data | Languages: TypeScript
weaknesses: Needs deeper repo reading to confirm system depth
learning_for_eventbaer: Location and venue intelligence deserve their own deliberate layer next to event truth.
possible_implication: Review and adapt the pattern into the EventBaer worker architecture, not as direct dependency.
